name: consumption trace: each consulted source records fetched_at from the cache marker
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/provenance .claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch && echo "2026-05-13T08:00:00Z" > .claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch/google-tsguide.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/consumption-trace.sh" --commit-sha abc123 --consulted google-tsguide --emit "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc123.json" && grep -E "fetched_at.*2026-05-13T08:00:00Z" .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc123.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
